title: Festive Mason Jars with Handle, Lid, and Straw - Set of 3 Holiday-Themed Drinking Glass/Tumbler-Christmas Themed Mason jar with Lid- Ideal for Parties, Decor, and Gift Giving (Pack of 2)
features: Enjoy the holiday season with our Christmas-themed mason jars featuring charming Santa, reindeer, and snowman prints.
Complete Drinkware Set: Each jar comes with a handle for easy carrying, a screw-on lid to prevent spills, and a reusable straw for sipping your favorite cold beverages.
Holiday Cheer: Add a touch of festive cheer to your Christmas gatherings, parties, and celebrations with these adorable jars – a perfect choice for both kids and adults.
High-Quality Printing: Our mason jars are adorned with high-quality, vivid Santa, reindeer, and snowman designs that won't fade, ensuring a delightful and long-lasting holiday experience.
Versatile Usage: These jars are not only great for serving beverages but also make charming decorative pieces, perfect for gifting or as table centerpieces during the holiday season.
